title: Ẹmwẹ
empty_subtitle: Kẹ bọtin ode ne u gha bẹ ghe ẹmwẹ
invite_link_copied: A ya sẹ ọda itiẹ gbe!
remove_friend_body: U re tẹ ne u hẹnmwẹ ne u gha rhan {{name}} kua vbe ọre ẹre?
remove_friend_body_alt: U re tẹ ne u hẹnmwẹ ne u gha rhan {{name}} kua khin ọre?
muted_body: U i ghi gha mwẹ ẹmwẹ ne ọ rre {{name}}.
unmuted_body: U ma gha mwẹ ẹmwẹ ne ọ rre {{name}} nẹ.
mute_error: I gha rhan ehe ne a ya mu do.
message_blocked: Ẹmwẹ i re ne ọghe na. Ọkpa vbe uwa ọ khin ne ọ ya mu nọhọ do.
message_blocked_alt: U i gha tiẹ ẹmwẹ ne ọghe na. Iran ọ khin ne iran ya mu ọ do ne ọ khin u ya mu iran do.
message_failed: I gha tiẹ ẹmwẹ. Kpaye ghee ọda ẹre ke gberra.
upload_error_body: I gha rhan fayil nẹ. Kpaye ke gberra.
report_submitted_body: A ya lẹẹ ne ẹmwẹ ẹre. Ẹvbo ne a gha kẹ ghee ẹre na ma ghee.
unexpected_error: Uhunmwọnda ne a i re tẹ gbe.
